description: Z-Image Turbo LoRA training via Ostris ai-toolkit. Pinned to L4 (24 GB) because (a) Z-Image-Turbo + training adapter v1 + rank-32 LoRA fits in <24 GB at batch=1 bf16 grad-checkpoint, and (b) RTX Pro 6000 is denied on the wisent-480400 project. Apt list covers cv2 (libgl1, libglib2.0-0) + git-lfs for HF model pulls + build-essential for any pip wheel that lacks a binary. pre_command sets LD_LIBRARY_PATH to torch's bundled cu128 cuBLAS — without this the system cu129 libs win at load time and the first inference call crashes with `Invalid handle. Cannot load symbol cublasLtCreate`. See docs/zimage-lora-handoff.md in wisent-content-platform for the full runbook.
